files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreComplexTypeConverterConvention
files.Summary: A convention that registers implementations declared via or HasKEFCoreComplexTypeConverter() into at model finalization time.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreComplexTypeEquatableConvention
files.Summary: A convention that verifies all complex types in the model implement value equality, either via or by overriding .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreConventionSetBuilder
files.Summary: A builder for building conventions for the KEFCore provider.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreManageEventsConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves and stores the Kafka event management flag for each entity type as a model annotation ().

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreProducerConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity producer configuration overrides at model finalization time, storing the result as a on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreReadOnlyConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity read-only configuration at model finalization time, storing the result as a model annotation on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreRocksDbLifecycleAttributeConvention
files.Summary: Reads from CLR entity types and writes the corresponding KEFCore RocksDB lifecycle metadata into the EF Core model.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreSerDesConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity serialization type overrides at model finalization time, storing the results as model annotations on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreStoreLookupConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity Streams store query optimization flags at model finalization time, storing the results as model annotations on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreTopicNamingConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves and stores the Kafka topic name for each entity type as a model annotation ().

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreTopicPartitionsConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity topic partition and replication factor configuration at model finalization time, storing the results as model annotations on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreTopicRetentionConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity topic retention configuration at model finalization time, storing the results as model annotations on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Conventions.KEFCoreTransactionalConvention
files.Summary: A convention that resolves per-entity Kafka transaction group configuration at model finalization time, storing the result as a model annotation on each .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Internal.KEFCoreAnnotationNames

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.Internal.KEFCoreProducerAnnotation
files.Summary: Internal DTO stored as a model annotation to carry per-entity producer configuration overrides. Populated by from or .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreComplexTypeConverterAttribute
files.Summary: Associates a implementation with this complex type, registering it in at model finalization time.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreIgnoreEquatableCheckAttribute
files.Summary: Suppresses the KEFCore equality check for this complex type.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreIgnoreEventsAttribute
files.Summary: Disables KEFCore event management for this entity type, overriding the context-level default set by UseKEFCoreManageEvents().

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreProducerAttribute
files.Summary: Overrides producer configuration for the Kafka topic associated with this entity type. Only explicitly set properties override the global .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreReadOnlyAttribute
files.Summary: Marks this entity type as read-only within the current . Any attempt to write entries of this type via will throw .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreRocksDbLifecycleAttribute
files.Summary: Declares the type associated to an entity type.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreSerDesAttribute
files.Summary: Overrides the serialization types for the Kafka topic associated with this entity type. Takes precedence over the context-level , and .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreStoreLookupAttribute
files.Summary: Configures the Kafka Streams store query optimization flags for this entity type, overriding the context-level defaults set via options.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreTopicAttribute
files.Summary: Overrides the Kafka topic name for an entity type. Takes precedence over > and entity name.

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreTopicPartitionsAttribute
files.Summary: Overrides the number of partitions for the Kafka topic associated with this entity type. Takes precedence over . Applied at topic creation time ().

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreTopicPrefixAttribute
files.Summary: Sets the Kafka topic prefix. Can be applied to an entity class or to a DbContext class (acts as default for all entities in that context).

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreTopicReplicationFactorAttribute
files.Summary: Overrides the replication factor for the Kafka topic associated with this entity type. Takes precedence over . Applied at topic creation time ().

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreTopicRetentionAttribute
files.Summary: Overrides the retention policy for the Kafka topic associated with this entity type. Applied at topic creation time ().

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Metadata.KEFCoreTransactionalAttribute
files.Summary: Assigns this entity type to a Kafka transaction group, enabling exactly-once semantics for all entities sharing the same .

files.Title: MASES.EntityFrameworkCore.KNet.Storage.Internal.EntityTypeProducer<TKey, TValueContainer, TJVMKey, TJVMValueContainer>
files.Summary: This is an internal API that supports the Entity Framework Core infrastructure and not subject to the same compatibility standards as public APIs. It may be changed or removed without notice in any release. You should only use it directly in your code with extreme caution and knowing that doing so can result in application failures when updating to a new Entity Framework Core release.
